name: Prediction Market Agent
description: Build a paper, signal, or user-confirmed prediction market agent with receipt-bound paid access.
whatItDoes: Watches selected prediction market categories or market IDs.
Publishes paper trades, signals, or user-confirmed live intents.
Can monetize access through paid API responses, receipts, and visible fee waterfalls.
receiptProofBehavior: Request quote before paid signal access.
Submit payment proof or direct split proofs.
Verify signed receipt before unlocking premium signals.
suggestedPrompt: Create a prediction market signal agent using DNA x402. It should publish paper and signal outputs, require receipts for paid premium signals, show a visible fee waterfall, and never use backend custody or backend signing.
